member.name: T:PaymentGateway.GatewayClient
member.summary: Primary client for interacting with the gateway

member.name: T:PaymentGateway.GatewayClient.RequestStartedEventHandler
member.summary: Event when a request is initiated

member.name: E:PaymentGateway.GatewayClient.RequestStarted
member.summary: Invoked when request is initiated

member.name: T:PaymentGateway.GatewayClient.RequestCompletedEventHandler
member.summary: Event when a request is completed

member.name: E:PaymentGateway.GatewayClient.RequestCompleted
member.summary: Invoked when request is competed

member.name: M:PaymentGateway.GatewayClient.#ctor(System.String,PaymentGateway.GatewayProvider)
member.summary: Initialize for use with any supported provider

member.name: M:PaymentGateway.GatewayClient.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize for use with default provider (NMI)

member.name: M:PaymentGateway.GatewayClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initialize for use with any supported provider. Please file an issue at https://github.com/ahwm/payment-gateway-client if using a provider not included

summary.para: Edit an existing recurring plan.

para.em: Be careful when editing an existing plan, as all customers signed up for this plan will have their billing changed based on your edits.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.GatewayProvider.ZeroMerchant
member.summary: 0 Merchant. See https://0merchant.transactiongateway.com/merchants/resources/integration/integration_portal.php

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.GatewayProvider.AdvancedMerchantGroup
member.summary: Advanced Merchant Group. See https://secure.advancedmerchantgroupgateway.com/merchants/resources/integration/integration_portal.php

member.summary: Aliant Payments. See https://secure.apsmerchantgateway.com/merchants/resources/integration/integration_portal.php

member.summary: Aliant Payments. See https://gateway.alignpay.com/merchants/resources/integration/integration_portal.php

member.summary: CryptoBucks (not for use with crypto currency API). See https://secure.apsmerchantgateway.com/merchants/resources/integration/integration_portal.php

member.summary: Electronic Processing of North America (EPNA). See https://epna.transactiongateway.com/merchants/resources/integration/integration_portal.php

member.name: M:PaymentGateway.GatewayProvider.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Please file an issue at https://github.com/ahwm/payment-gateway-client if using a provider not included

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.CustomerVaultId
member.summary: Specifies a Customer Vault id. If not set, the payment gateway will randomly generate a Customer Vault id.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.BillingId
member.summary: Billing id to be assigned or updated. If none is provided, one will be created or the billing id with priority '1' will be updated.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.PaymentToken
member.summary: The tokenized version of the customer's card or check information. This will be generated by Collect.js and is usable only once.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.GooglePayPaymentData
member.summary: The encrypted token created when integration directly to the Google Pay SDK.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.CheckName
member.summary: Name on the customer's ACH account

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.CheckABA
member.summary: Customer's bank routing number

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.CheckAccount
member.summary: Customer's bank account number

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.AccountHolderType
member.summary: The type of ACH account the customer has ("business" or "personal")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.AccountType
member.summary: The ACH account entity of the customer ("checking" or "savings")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.StandardEntryClass
member.summary: The Standard Entry Class code of the ACH transaction ("PPD", "WEB", "TEL", or "CCD")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.MerchantDefinedFields
member.summary: Can be set up in merchant control panel under 'Settings'->'Merchant Defined Fields'.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.ShippingId
member.summary: Shipping entry id. If none is provided, one will be created or the billing id with priority '1' will be updated.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.SourceTransactionId
member.summary: Specifies a payment gateway transaction id in order to associate payment information with a Customer Vault record.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddCustomer.ACUEnabled
member.summary: If set to true, credit card will be evaluated and sent based upon Automatic Card Updater settings. If set to false, credit card will not be submitted for updates when Automatic Card Updater runs.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.CustomerSale.InitiatedBy
member.summary: Who initiated the transaction. Values: 'customer' or 'merchant'

summary.para: The indicator of the stored credential.
Values: 'stored' or 'used'
Use 'stored' when processing the initial transaction in which you are storing a customer's payment details (customer credentials) in the Customer Vault or other third-party payment storage system.

Use 'used' when processing a subsequent or follow-up transaction using the customer payment details (customer credentials) you have already stored to the Customer Vault or third-party payment storage method.
Total amount to be invoiced. Must be greater than 0.00. Required.
Format: x.xx
Billing email address. Required.
An invoice will be sent to this address when it is created.
When the invoice should be paid. One of 'upon_receipt' (default) or integers from 0-999
What payment methods a customer may use when paying invoice.
Defaults to all available payment methods available in your merchant account
Values: 'cc', 'ck', and 'cs'. Multiple payment types can be selected by comma-separating values.
If using Multiple MIDs, route to this processor (processor_id is obtained under Settings → Transaction Routing in the Control Panel).
If allowing multiple payment types, one processor_id can be selected per payment type by submitting comma-separated values.
The transaction currency. Format: ISO 4217
Order Description

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.CreateInvoice.FirstName
member.summary: Cardholder's first name.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.CreateInvoice.LastName
member.summary: Cardholder's last name.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.CreateInvoice.State
member.summary: Card billing state. Format: CC

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.CreateInvoice.Country
member.summary: Card billing country as shown in ISO 3166. Format: CC

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.CreateInvoice.MerchantDefinedFields
member.summary: You can pass custom information in up to 20 fields.

member.name: T:PaymentGateway.Models.UpdateInvoice
member.summary: All variables (besides currency) on an invoice may be updated. Updating an invoice will not result in a new invoice being sent to the customer. To send the invoice after updating an invoice, use the send_invoice request after making changes.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.UpdateInvoice.InvoiceId
member.summary: The invoice ID to be updated.

member.name: T:PaymentGateway.Models.SendInvoice
member.summary: The invoice will be sent to the billing email address assigned to the invoice.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.SendInvoice.InvoiceId
member.summary: The invoice ID to be updated.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.CloseInvoice.InvoiceId
member.summary: The invoice ID to be updated.

summary.para: Merchant defined description code of the item being purchased.
Description of the item(s) being supplied.
International description code of the individual good or service being supplied. The acquirer or processor will provide a list of current codes.
Code for units of measurement as used in international trade. Default: 'EACH'

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.InvoiceProduct.ItemUnitCost
member.summary: Unit cost of item purchased, may contain up to 4 decimal places.

summary.para: Quantity of the item(s) being purchased.
Default: '1'

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.InvoiceProduct.ItemTotalAmount
member.summary: Purchase amount associated with the item. Defaults to: 'item_unit_cost_#' x 'item_quantity_#' rounded to the nearest penny.

summary.para: Amount of sales tax on specific item. Amount should not be included in 'total_amount_#'.
Default: '0.00'
Format: x.xx

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.InvoiceProduct.ItemTaxRate
member.summary: Percentage representing the value-added tax applied.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.InvoiceProduct.ItemDiscountAmount
member.summary: Discount amount which can have been applied by the merchant on the sale of the specific item. Amount should not be included in 'total_amount_#'.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.InvoiceProduct.ItemDiscountRate
member.summary: Discount rate for the line item. 1% = 1.00.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.InvoiceProduct.ItemTaxType
member.summary: Type of value-added taxes that are being used.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.InvoiceProduct.ItemAlternateTaxId
member.summary: Tax identification number of the merchant that reported the alternate tax amount.

summary.para: The number of payments before the recurring plan is complete.
Notes: '0' for until canceled
The plan amount to be charged each billing cycle.
Format: x.xx

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddRecurringPlan.PlanName
member.summary: The display name of the plan.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddRecurringPlan.PlanId
member.summary: The unique plan ID that references only this recurring plan.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddRecurringPlan.DayFrequency
member.summary: How often, in days, to charge the customer. Cannot be set with 'month_frequency' or 'day_of_month'.

summary.para: How often, in months, to charge the customer. Cannot be set with 'day_frequency'. Must be set with 'day_of_month'.
Values: 1 through 24
The day that the customer will be charged. Cannot be set with 'day_frequency'. Must be set with 'month_frequency'.
Values: 1 through 31 - for months without 29, 30, or 31 days, the charge will be on the last day
Edit an existing recurring plan.

para.em: Be careful when editing an existing plan, as all customers signed up for this plan will have their billing changed based on your edits.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.EditRecurringPlan.CurrentPlanId
member.summary: Only relevant for editing an existing plan, the value will be the 'plan_id' that will be edited in this request.

summary.para: The plan ID of the plan that the subscription will be associated with.
Omit to add custom subscription.
The number of payments before the recurring plan is complete.
Notes: '0' for until canceled
The plan amount to be charged each billing cycle.
Format: x.xx
How often, in days, to charge the customer. Cannot be set with 'month_frequency' or 'day_of_month'.
How often, in months, to charge the customer. Cannot be set with 'day_frequency'. Must be set with 'day_of_month'.
Values: 1 through 24
The day that the customer will be charged. Cannot be set with 'day_frequency'. Must be set with 'month_frequency'.
Values: 1 through 31 - for months without 29, 30, or 31 days, the charge will be on the last day
The first day that the customer will be charged.
Format: YYYYMMDD

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.PaymentToken
member.summary: The tokenized version of the customer's card or check information. This will be generated by Collect.js and is usable only once.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.GooglePayPaymentData
member.summary: The encrypted token created when integration directly to the Google Pay SDK.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.Payment
member.summary: Type of payment ("creditcard" or "check")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.CheckName
member.summary: Name on the customer's ACH account

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.CheckABA
member.summary: Customer's bank routing number

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.CheckAccount
member.summary: Customer's bank account number

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.AccountHolderType
member.summary: The type of ACH account the customer has ("business" or "personal")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.AccountType
member.summary: The ACH account entity of the customer ("checking" or "savings")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.StandardEntryClass
member.summary: The Standard Entry Class code of the ACH transaction ("PPD", "WEB", "TEL", or "CCD")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.Currency
member.summary: The transaction currency. Format: ISO 4217 (USD, CAD, etc)

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.ProcessorId
member.summary: If using Multiple MIDs, route to this processor (processor_id is obtained under Settings → Transaction Routing in the Control Panel).

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.PONumber
member.summary: Cardholder's purchase order number.

summary.para: If set to true, when the customer is charged, they will be sent a transaction receipt.
Values: 'true' or 'false'

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.SourceTransactionId
member.summary: Specifies a payment gateway transaction id in order to associate payment information with a Subscription record.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.AddSubscription.MerchantDefinedFields
member.summary: Can be set up in merchant control panel under 'Settings'->'Merchant Defined Fields'.

summary.para: If set to true, credit card will be evaluated and sent based upon Automatic Card Updater settings. If set to false, credit card will not be submitted for updates when Automatic Card Updater runs.
Default: 'true'
Values: 'true' or 'false'

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.UpdateSubscription.SubscriptionId
member.summary: The subscription ID that will be updated.

member.name: T:PaymentGateway.Models.DeleteSubscription
member.summary: Delete a subscription

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.DeleteSubscription.SubscriptionId
member.summary: The subscription ID that will be deleted.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.ShippingState
member.summary: Format: CC

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.ShippingCountry
member.summary: Country codes are as shown in ISO 3166. Format: CC

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.PaymentToken
member.summary: The tokenized version of the customer's card or check information. This will be generated by Collect.js and is usable only once.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.GooglePayPaymentData
member.summary: The encrypted token created when integration directly to the Google Pay SDK.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.CheckName
member.summary: Name on the customer's ACH account

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.CheckABA
member.summary: Customer's bank routing number

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.CheckAccount
member.summary: Customer's bank account number

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.AccountHolderType
member.summary: The type of ACH account the customer has ("business" or "personal")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.AccountType
member.summary: The ACH account entity of the customer ("checking" or "savings")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.StandardEntryClass
member.summary: The Standard Entry Class code of the ACH transaction ("PPD", "WEB", "TEL", or "CCD")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.Amount
member.summary: Format: x.xx

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.Surcharge
member.summary: Format: x.xx

summary.para: How much less a customer paid due to a cash discount
Format: x.xx, only applicable to cash and check transactions

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.Currency
member.summary: The transaction currency. Format: ISO 4217 (USD, CAD, etc)

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.Payment
member.summary: Type of payment ("creditcard", "check", "cash")

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.ProcessorId
member.summary: If using Multiple MIDs, route to this processor (processor_id is obtained under Settings → Transaction Routing in the Control Panel).

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.TestMode
member.summary: Set to "enabled" and use the test credit card account information in the provider's documentation to test a one-off transaction.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.MerchantDefinedFields
member.summary: Can be set up in merchant control panel under 'Settings'->'Merchant Defined Fields'.

summary.para: If set to true, when the customer is charged, they will be sent a transaction receipt.
Values: 'true' or 'false'
Cardholder signature image. For use with "sale" and "auth" actions only.
Format: base64 encoded raw PNG image. (16kiB maximum)
Set 3D Secure condition. Value used to determine E-commerce indicator (ECI).
Values: 'verified' or 'attempted'
3DSecure version.
Examples: "2.0.0" or "2.2.0"
Cardholder authentication verification value.
Format: base64 encoded
Cardholder authentication transaction id.
Format: base64 encoded

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.ECI
member.summary: E-commerce indicator

summary.para: Directory Server Transaction ID. May be provided as part of 3DSecure 2.0 authentication.
Format: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Sale.PinlessDebitOverride
member.summary: Set to 'Y' if you have Pinless Debit Conversion enabled but want to opt out for this transaction. Feature applies to selected processors only.

summary.para: Specifies an exemption to Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) requirements for a transaction. Qualifying transactions bypass additional authentication steps. Available on select Processors; contact your Account Manager for details.
Values: "na", "low_value", "tra_exemption", "trusted_merchant", "secure_corporate_payment", "merchant_initiated_transaction", "recurring_payment", or "sca_delegation"

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Offline.AuthorizationCode
member.summary: Specify authorization code. For use with "offline" action only.

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Capture.TransactionId
member.summary: Original payment gateway transaction id

summary.para: Total amount to be settled. This amount must be equal to or less than the original authorized amount.
Format: x.xx

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Capture.TrackingNumber
member.summary: Shipping tracking number

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.Capture.OrderId
member.summary: Order id.

summary.para: Shipping carrier.
Values: 'ups', 'fedex', 'dhl', or 'usps'
Cardholder signature image.
Format: base64 encoded raw PNG image. (16kiB maximum)

member.name: P:PaymentGateway.Models.WebhookResponse.Nonce
member.summary: Single-use nonce. The application should validate one-time use to prevent replay attacks.

member.name: T:PaymentGateway.WebhookParser
member.summary: Methods to validate webhook events

member.name: M:PaymentGateway.WebhookParser.ParseWebhookData(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verify the webhook signature
member.param: Signing Key from gateway control panel
member.exception: If "webhook-Signature" header is missing nonce (t= paramenter) or signature (s= parameter)
